en_title: Ryse: Son of Rome Had Plans To Be Xbox’s Assassin’s Creed
cn_title: XBOX《Ryse：罗马之子》曾计划跨越多个时代
subtitle: 帝国兴衰未成篇
opus_summary: Crytek曾计划把《Ryse：罗马之子》发展成跨越多个时代的系列，并扩展关卡、战斗与多人玩法。但初代口碑和销量不佳，加上IP出售谈判破裂，计划最终搁浅。

paragraphs.en: What are some of the best-looking games of all time? Many examples that come to my mind are not from this generation, but rather the early 2010s: Metal Gear Solid 5, The Witcher 3, and Batman: Arkham Knight all looked stunning upon release, and still do today.
paragraphs.cn: 史上画面最出色的游戏有哪些？我想到的许多例子并非来自本世代，而是2010年代初期：《潜龙谍影5》《巫师3》和《蝙蝠侠：阿卡姆骑士》发售时都令人惊艳，时至今日依然如此。

paragraphs.en: To this list I would also add Ryse: Son of Rome , German developer Crytek’s ill-fated Xbox One launch title in which you play as a Roman centurion seeking to avenge his dead family. It is gloriously, mouth-wateringly cinematic, more so than many actual works of cinema.
paragraphs.cn: 我还会把德国开发商Crytek命运多舛的XBOX One首发游戏《Ryse：罗马之子》列入其中。玩家扮演一名为死去家人复仇的罗马百夫长；游戏拥有华丽得令人垂涎的电影感，甚至胜过不少真正的电影。

paragraphs.en: Unfortunately, it’s also rather short, taking only around 6 hours to complete. Former employees say as much as two thirds of planned content had to be cut in the race to make launch day. The crunch was brutal, but many of the game’s creators took comfort in the knowledge they were laying the foundations for not just a sequel, but an entire franchise – one that would take us far beyond Rome.
paragraphs.cn: 遗憾的是，游戏流程也很短，大约6小时即可通关。前员工表示，为了赶上首发日，最多有三分之二的计划内容不得不被删减。加班十分残酷，但许多创作者想到自己打下的不只是续作基础，而是一个能带玩家远远走出罗马的完整系列，仍感到些许慰藉。

paragraphs.en: While work on the original game was wrapping up, four concept artists, a historical researcher, and the key leadership team of Ryse: Son of Rome got together to figure out where they could take things moving forward.
paragraphs.cn: 初代游戏进入收尾阶段时，四名概念美术师、一名历史研究员和《Ryse：罗马之子》的核心领导团队聚在一起，探讨系列未来能走向何方。

paragraphs.en: Leading this group was Patrick Hanenberger, a production designer who had previously worked at DreamWorks. He’d initially been brought on board as a visual consultant to help make Ryse feel – as Crytek’s then-CEO Cevat Yerli used to say – like a “playable movie.” Later, he tells IGN, “they offered me a job as the franchise’s art director.”
paragraphs.cn: 这个团队由曾在梦工厂任职的制作设计师Patrick Hanenberger带领。他最初以视觉顾问身份加入，帮助《Ryse》呈现Crytek时任首席执行官Cevat Yerli所说的「可玩的电影」质感。他告诉IGN，后来「他们邀请我担任这个系列的艺术总监」。

paragraphs.en: Also set to be involved in some capacity was Todd Papy of Sony’s Santa Monica Studio. Papy joined Crytek in late 2013 after having directed God of War: Ascension to work on what was then reported to be an “unannounced project.” A former Crytek employee who spoke to IGN under condition of anonymity affirmed what was back then just speculation: that he would apply his experience with games set in ancient Greece to a game set in ancient Rome.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼圣莫妮卡工作室的Todd Papy也计划以某种方式参与其中。Papy执导《战神：升天》后于2013年底加入Crytek，负责当时据称是一项「未公布项目」的工作。一名前Crytek员工在匿名条件下向IGN证实了当年的猜测：他会把制作古希腊背景游戏的经验运用到一款古罗马题材游戏中。

paragraphs.en: Whether any of the sequels would in fact be set in Rome was, however, the subject of debate. “Part of the conversations that were happening were about what it was that people were liking about Ryse,” Yannick Boucher, who served as one of the original game’s project managers, tells IGN. “Was it the Roman thing specifically, or history more generally? Do we stay in Rome, or go to some other empire?”
paragraphs.cn: 不过，续作是否真的还会以罗马为背景，当时存在争议。初代项目经理之一Yannick Boucher告诉IGN：「讨论的一部分，是人们究竟喜欢《Ryse》的什么。是罗马这个特定元素，还是更广义的历史？我们应留在罗马，还是前往另一个帝国？」

paragraphs.en: “I was super stoked to do a Viking game,” recalls Peter Gornstein, Ryse’s art director and director of cinematics. For one, the opportunities were endless: a game about Vikings could have taken players on raids along the English and French coasts, the shores of Newfoundland, and even the city of Constantinople, where they served as bodyguards to Byzantine emperors. It was also uncharted territory – at least back then. The History Channel’s Vikings TV show was still on its first season, and Assassin’s Creed Valhalla nearly a decade away.
paragraphs.cn: 《Ryse》的艺术总监兼过场动画导演Peter Gornstein回忆：「我当时特别想做一款维京游戏。」这种题材的可能性无穷无尽：玩家可以沿英格兰和法国海岸、纽芬兰海岸展开劫掠，甚至前往君士坦丁堡；维京人曾在那里担任拜占庭皇帝的护卫。至少在当时，这还是一片未开拓的领域：历史频道剧集《维京传奇》仍在播第一季，《刺客信条：英灵殿》则要近十年后才会问世。

paragraphs.en: “It would have been great to explore a part of history that a lot of people didn’t yet know about,” says Gornstein.
paragraphs.cn: Gornstein说：「探索一段许多人当时尚不了解的历史，本来会很棒。」

paragraphs.en: Other settings that were reportedly considered included feudal Japan – Hanenberger mentions a number of events that interested him, including the failed Mongol invasions led by Kublai Khan, the arrival of European merchants, and the civil wars of the Sengoku period – as well as the Ottoman Empire, which defeated the Byzantines in 1453.
paragraphs.cn: 据称，团队还考虑过日本封建时代。Hanenberger提到多段令他感兴趣的历史，包括忽必烈领导的蒙古入侵失败、欧洲商人的到来以及战国时代的内战。此外还有在1453年击败拜占庭的奥斯曼帝国。

paragraphs.en: Not everyone was on board with leaving Rome. As Boucher puts it: “Some felt like we had just set the foundations for this IP, and now we were already diverging a bit. A lot of people were super keen on Japan, unsurprisingly. But that’s not like going from Rome to Greece. It would have been a big departure.”
paragraphs.cn: 并非所有人都赞成离开罗马。Boucher表示：「有人觉得我们才刚为这个IP打下基础，现在就已经有些偏离了。不出所料，很多人非常想做日本背景。但这不像从罗马转到希腊，会是一次很大的转变。」

paragraphs.en: Hanenberger thought of several ways to connect and justify expanding settings. Thematically, for example, the franchise could come to explore the question of “how empires rise and fall – and why.” He also considered tying each installment together narratively, with characters and events in one game linking back to another. Each story could be set in motion by that of the previous installment, like dominos. Or, you know, history itself.
paragraphs.cn: Hanenberger想出了几种连接并合理化背景扩展的方法。比如在主题上，系列可以探索「帝国如何兴衰，以及为何兴衰」。他还考虑在叙事上串联每一部作品，让一部游戏中的人物和事件回扣另一部。每个故事都可以由上一部的故事触发，如同多米诺骨牌，或者说，就像历史本身。

paragraphs.en: Had those planned sequels happened, they would have featured a more open-ended design than the original Ryse. “When we talked about correcting some of that game’s weaknesses,” says Boucher, “changing the levels was among the first things that came up, as most of them were basically just a straight corridor.” The vision at the time was not far off from God of War 2018: not quite open-world, but not completely linear either.
paragraphs.cn: 如果这些续作得以实现，它们会采用比初代《Ryse》更开放的设计。Boucher说：「当我们讨论如何改正游戏的一些缺点时，首先提到的事项之一就是改变关卡，因为大多数关卡基本只是一条笔直走廊。」当时的构想与2018年的《战神》相差不远：并非真正的开放世界，但也不完全线性。

paragraphs.en: The team also thought about introducing new game mechanics, many of them cut from or left out of the original Ryse due to time constraints, including vehicle navigation and a PVP multiplayer mode (Son of Rome ended up having both solo and co-op PVE where you fought off waves inside the Colosseum).
paragraphs.cn: 团队还考虑引入新的游戏机制，其中许多曾因时间限制从初代《Ryse》中删去或未能加入，包括载具操控和PVP多人模式（《罗马之子》最终提供了单人及合作PVE玩法，玩家要在斗兽场中抵御一波波敌人）。

paragraphs.en: The anonymous employee tells me they would have liked to have made single-player combat more dynamic. In parts of Ryse, when you venture into Britain to crush the rebellion of Queen Boudica, you advance in testudo formation, raising your shield alongside your fellow soldiers to form an impregnable barrier. In the final game, gameplay is limited to shielding yourself from enemy fire and returning fire of your own – all with the press of a button. “Our original plan was that you’d be able to leave and reenter this formation at will,” they say, “fighting enemies on your own and then returning to position when you feel like doing so.”
paragraphs.cn: 那名匿名员工告诉我，他们原本希望让单人战斗更具变化。《Ryse》的部分流程中，玩家前往不列颠镇压布狄卡女王的叛乱，会以龟甲阵推进，与战友一同举盾组成坚不可摧的屏障。最终版本的玩法仅限于按键举盾抵挡敌方火力，再进行还击。他说：「我们原本计划让玩家随时离开或重新加入阵形，独自与敌人作战，并在想要归队时回到位置。」

paragraphs.en: The sequels could have played around with other real-world military tactics, like the Parthian shot (where cavalry soldiers feign a full-speed retreat, only to turn around and firing arrows) or Kakuyoku (a Sengoku-era formation where a single defensive line turns into a pincer movement, attacking the enemy from both sides).
paragraphs.cn: 续作还可以尝试其他现实军事战术，例如帕提亚回马箭（骑兵假装全速撤退，随后转身放箭），或战国时代的鹤翼阵（单条防线转为钳形攻势，从两侧夹击敌人）。

paragraphs.en: One area where the sequels would not diverge from the original Ryse was aesthetics. Son of Rome was not historically accurate, but it did aim for a certain emotional or psychological accuracy. As Gornstein puts it, they did not try to present Rome as it was, but as how it might have appeared to someone “who lived in a village somewhere, five hours away. To someone who visited the city for the first and only time in their life, everything must have seemed completely overwhelming.”
paragraphs.cn: 续作不会偏离初代《Ryse》的一个方面是美学。《罗马之子》在历史上并不准确，但力求实现某种情感或心理层面的真实。Gornstein表示，他们并非试图呈现罗马实际的样子，而是呈现它在某类人眼中的模样：那人「住在五小时路程外的某个村庄，一生第一次也是唯一一次来到这座城市时，一切必定都显得无比震撼」。

paragraphs.en: “It’s the same sensation as when, in the game, you go to York and Dover,” Hanenberger adds. “Those cliffs are awe-inspiring. That’s what we were trying to capture, and would have wanted to capture going forward.”
paragraphs.cn: Hanenberger补充：「这和你在游戏中前往约克与多佛时的感受相同。那些悬崖令人敬畏。这正是我们试图捕捉的感觉，也是我们今后本想继续捕捉的感觉。」

paragraphs.en: The original game wasn’t just larger-than-life, but also veered into the supernatural, with two seemingly mortal characters – Aquilo and Aestas – revealed to be gods, playing a secret game with people as their pawns. This supernatural element, says Gornstein, would have continued in the sequels, mapped onto different religions and mythologies. As in the original, though, their presence would have remained subtle, pushed into the background.
paragraphs.cn: 初代游戏不仅充满夸张壮阔的场面，也涉及超自然元素。两名看似凡人的角色Aquilo和Aestas被揭示为神祇，暗中以人类为棋子展开博弈。Gornstein表示，这种超自然元素会延续至续作，并对应不同的宗教与神话。不过与初代一样，它们仍会保持隐晦，退居背景。

paragraphs.en: When Hanenberger and Gornstein pitched their franchise plan to Microsoft, the response was enthusiastic. “They told us it was ‘the most cohesive and well-thought IP pitch they had ever seen,’” Hanenberger recalls. “It all seemed to go very well.”
paragraphs.cn: Hanenberger和Gornstein向微软提案系列计划时，对方反应热烈。Hanenberger回忆：「他们告诉我们，这是‘他们见过最连贯、考虑最周全的IP提案’。一切看上去都非常顺利。」

paragraphs.en: According to the employees who spoke with IGN, the sequels to Ryse were never formally cancelled. Instead, work on the franchise simply stopped after the original game underperformed both critically and commercially – an outcome that perhaps could have been avoided had the developers not been required to finish the game before the launch of the Xbox One.
paragraphs.cn: 据接受IGN采访的员工所说，《Ryse》续作从未被正式取消。只是初代在口碑和商业表现上均未达到预期后，系列工作便停止了。如果开发者没有被要求赶在XBOX One上市前完成游戏，这种结果或许本可避免。

paragraphs.en: Ultimately, the reason the Ryse series ended up in limbo is because Crytek refused to sell the IP to Microsoft. The conglomerate no longer wanted to finance the franchise if they couldn’t buy the rights, while Crytek – to this day a privately owned company – wouldn’t work on something that somebody else owned. As a result of this impasse, the two parted ways, and Crytek switched focus to other projects.
paragraphs.cn: 《Ryse》系列最终陷入停滞，是因为Crytek拒绝把IP出售给微软。微软如果无法买下权利，就不愿继续资助这个系列；而时至今日仍是私营公司的Crytek，也不愿开发归他人所有的作品。僵局之下，双方分道扬镳，Crytek转而专注其他项目。

paragraphs.en: For those who worked on the game, feelings towards Ryse are bittersweet. “The last month, I worked 30 days straight,” Boucher remembers. “Then we breathed a sigh of relief, only to get hit with a 60 on Metacritic.”
paragraphs.cn: 对参与开发的人而言，回忆《Ryse》时五味杂陈。Boucher回忆：「最后一个月，我连续工作了30天。随后我们刚松一口气，就迎来了Metacritic上的60分。」

paragraphs.en: At the same time, working on Ryse taught them valuable lessons that they took with them as they went on to work on titles like Hitman, Battlefield 1, and Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，开发《Ryse》也让他们学到了宝贵经验；后来制作《杀手》《战地风云1》和《阿凡达：潘多拉边境》等游戏时，他们把这些经验带到了新岗位。

paragraphs.en: While Ryse didn’t make the impact that Crytek had hoped for, it still sold more than a million copies upon release. Over time, the game also grew a dedicated cult following that loves it for everything the developers got right. As someone who counts himself among this following, I think I speak for many when I say that wherever this franchise would have led, I would have followed.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管《Ryse》未能产生Crytek期待的影响，发售后销量仍超过100万份。随着时间推移，游戏也培养了一批忠实拥趸，他们喜爱开发者做对的每一个部分。身为其中一员，我想自己能代表许多人说：无论这个系列原本会走向何方，我都会一路追随。

pending_dict.note: 沿用请求中的社区译名，待确认
